title: Phase 3B: Dashboard layout - sidebar, topbar, mobile nav
description: Build the main authenticated dashboard layout with role-aware collapsible sidebar, top bar with user menu/notifications/branch selector/search, and mobile responsive shell with bottom navigation.
steps: Create src/app/(dashboard)/layout.tsx with main dashboard layout shell
Implement collapsible sidebar with module icons, active state, section grouping
Create src/components/layout/topbar.tsx with user menu, notification bell, branch selector, search trigger
Create src/components/layout/mobile-nav.tsx with bottom navigation for mobile roles
Implement responsive breakpoints (sidebar hidden on mobile, bottom nav shown)
Apply industrial-utilitarian aesthetic with dark mode as primary
